questions: How to arrange furniture feng shui?
feng shui te ki ki rule ache?
answers: Feng shui is an ancient Chinese practice of arranging your environment to promote positive energy flow (chi). It involves the placement of furniture, colors, and elements to create harmony in living spaces.

Feng shui works by balancing the five elements (wood, fire, earth, metal, water) in your space. Key tips include keeping the entrance clutter-free, positioning your bed away from the door, and adding plants for fresh energy.
Feng shui holo Chinese practice jeta ghor ar office ke eivabe sajano je positive energy flow hoy. Furniture placement, color choice, ar natural elements use kore balance create kora hoy.

Feng shui is about creating harmonious spaces by managing energy flow. Simple tips include decluttering, using mirrors strategically, avoiding sharp corners pointing at sitting areas, and keeping your front door area clean and welcoming.
